channel.title: Chocolate on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Chocolate on Barista At Home

item.title: Java Chip Frappuccino Recipe: Starbucks Copycat (It's Been Discontinued)
item.description: The Java Chip Frappuccino was removed from the US Starbucks menu — but you can make it at home in 5 minutes. Espresso, mocha sauce, mini chocolate chips, blended smooth.
